      "content": "Global Initiative for Asthma – GINA. ## **Access to anti-inflammatory inhalers for everyone with asthma – still an urgent need**. The Global Initiative for Asthma (GINA) theme for World Asthma Day 2026 is: **“Access to anti-inflammatory inhalers for everyone with asthma – still an urgent need”**. GINA continues to emphasize the need to ensure that all people with asthma can access inhaled medications that are essential for controlling the underlying disease and treating attacks. This year’s World Asthma Day theme reinforces that every person with asthma, including most pre-school children with asthma, should receive inhaled corticosteroids. These inhalers reduce the person’s risk of asthma attacks and reduce preventable asthma deaths. In low-middle-income countries, lack of availability or high cost of inhaled medicines, especially inhaled corticosteroid-containing inhalers, are major contributors to the fact that many attacks and 96% of global asthma deaths occur in these countries. We call on everyone to increase their efforts to ensure **“Access to anti-inflammatory inhalers for everyone with asthma”**, in all countries throughout the world.",
